error_label(e));\n100\t        }\n101\t        result\n102\t    }\n103\t}\n104\t\n105\tfn error_label(e: &miroir_core::scatter::NodeError) -> &'static str {\n106\t    match e {\n107\t        miroir_core::scatter::NodeError::NetworkError(_) => \"network\",\n108\t        miroir_core::scatter::NodeError::HttpError { .. } => \"http\",\n109\t        miroir_core::scatter::NodeError::Timeout => \"timeout\",\n110\t    }\n111\t}\n112\t\n113\tpub fn router<S>() -> axum::Router<S>\n114\twhere\n115\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n116\t{\n117\t    axum::Router::new()\n118\t        .route(\"/:index\", axum::routing::post(search_handler))\n119\t}\n120\t\n121\t/// Search request body.\n122\t#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]\n123\tstruct SearchRequestBody {\n124\t    q: Option<String>,\n125\t    offset: Option<usize>,\n126\t    limit: Option<usize>,\n127\t    filter: Option<Value>,\n128\t    facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n129\t    #[serde(rename = \"rankingScore\")]\n130\t    ranking_score: Option<bool>,\n131\t    #[serde(flatten)]\n132\t    rest: Value,\n133\t}\n134\t\n135\timpl std::fmt::Debug for SearchRequestBody {\n136\t    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {\n137\t        f.debug_struct(\"SearchRequestBody\")\n138\t            .field(\"q\", &\"[redacted]\")\n139\t            .field(\"offset\", &self.offset)\n140\t            .field(\"limit\", &self.limit)\n141\t            .field(\"filter\", &\"[redacted]\")\n142\t            .field(\"facets\", &self.facets)\n143\t            .field(\"ranking_score\", &self.ranking_score)\n144\t            .finish_non_exhaustive()\n145\t    }\n146\t}\n147\t\n148\t/// Search handler with DFS global-IDF preflight (OP#4).\n149\t///\n150\t/// This handler implements the `dfs_query_then_fetch` pattern:\n151\t/// 1. **Preflight phase**: Send term-frequency query to all shards, aggregate\n152\t///    global document frequencies at the coordinator.\n153\t/// 2. **Search phase**: Send the search query with global IDF attached so that\n154\t///    scoring uses corpus-wide statistics instead of per-shard local IDF.\n155\t///\n156\t/// Returns `X-Miroir-Degraded: shards=X,Y,Z` header when any shards are unavailable.\n157\t/// Strips `_miroir_shard` from all hits; strips `_rankingScore` unless client\n158\t/// explicitly requested it.\n159\t///\n160\t/// Session pinning (plan §13.6): If `X-Miroir-Session` header is present and\n161\t/// the session has a pending write, routes to the pinned group for read-your-writes.\n162\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n163\tasync fn search_handler(\n164\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n165\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n166\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n167\t    session_id: Option<Extension<SessionId>>,\n168\t    Json(body): Json<SearchRequestBody>,\n169\t) -> Result<Response, StatusCode> {\n170\t    let start = Instant::now();\n171\t    let client_requested_score = body.ranking_score.unwrap_or(false);\n172\t\n173\t    // Extract session ID from request extensions (set by session_pinning_middleware)\n174\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n175\t        let s = ext.0;\n176\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n177\t    });\n178\t\n179\t    // Extract source IP from X-Forwarded-For or X-Real-IP (trust proxy)\n180\t    let source_ip = headers\n181\t        .get(\"x-forwarded-for\")\n182\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n183\t        .and_then(|s| s.split(',').next())\n184\t        .or_else(|| headers.get(\"x-real-ip\").and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok()))\n185\t        .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n186\t        .trim()\n187\t        .to_string();\n188\t\n189\t    // Check rate limit for search UI (plan §4)\n190\t    let (limit, window_seconds) = match parse_rate_limit(&state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip) {\n191\t        Ok(parsed) => parsed,\n192\t        Err(e) => {\n193\t            warn!(error = %e, \"invalid search_ui.rate_limit.per_ip config, using default\");\n194\t            (60, 60) // Default: 60 requests per minute\n195\t        }\n196\t    };\n197\t\n198\t    let backend = state.config.search_ui.rate_limit.backend.as_str();\n199\t    if backend == \"redis\" {\n200\t        if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n201\t            match redis.check_rate_limit_search_ui(&source_ip, limit, window_seconds) {\n202\t                Ok((allowed, _wait_seconds)) => {\n203\t                    if !allowed {\n204\t                        warn!(\n205\t                            source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n206\t                            \"search UI rate limited (redis)\"\n207\t                        );\n208\t                        return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n209\t                    }\n210\t                    // Allowed, proceed\n211\t                }\n212\t                Err(e) => {\n213\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to check search UI rate limit\");\n214\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n215\t                }\n216\t            }\n217\t        }\n218\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n219\t        let (allowed, _wait_seconds) = state.local_search_ui_rate_limiter.check(\n220\t            &source_ip,\n221\t            limit,\n222\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n223\t        );\n224\t        if !allowed {\n225\t            warn!(\n226\t                source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n227\t                \"search UI rate limited (local backend)\"\n228\t            );\n229\t            return Err(StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS);\n230\t        }\n231\t    }\n232\t\n233\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n234\t    // Aliases are resolved at routing time; resolved index is used for scatter planning\n235\t    let (effective_index, resolved_targets) = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n236\t        let targets = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n237\t        state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n238\t        if targets != vec![index.clone()] {\n239\t            // It's an alias\n240\t            (index.clone(), targets)\n241\t        } else {\n242\t            // Not an alias - use index directly\n243\t            (index.clone(), vec![index.clone()])\n244\t        }\n245\t    } else {\n246\t        // Aliases disabled - use index directly\n247\t        (index.clone(), vec![index.clone()])\n248\t    };\n249\t\n250\t    // Session pinning logic (plan §13.6): Check if session has pending write\n251\t    let (pinned_group, strategy_label) = if let Some(ref sid) = sid {\n252\t        if let Some(group) = state.session_manager.get_pinned_group(sid).await {\n253\t            // Session has a pending write - apply wait strategy\n254\t            let strategy = state.session_manager.wait_strategy();\n255\t            match strategy {\n256\t                WaitStrategy::Block => {\n257\t                    // Block until write completes or timeout\n258\t                    let max_wait = state.session_manager.max_wait_duration();\n259\t                    let wait_start = std::time::Instant::now();\n260\t                    match state.session_manager.wait_for_write_completion(\n261\t                        sid,\n262\t                        &state.task_registry,\n263\t                        max_wait,\n264\t                    ).await {\n265\t                        Ok(true) => {\n266\t                            // Write succeeded, clear pin and use normal routing\n267\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n268\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n269\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"block\");\n270\t                            (None, Some(\"block_success\"))\n271\t                        }\n272\t                        Ok(false) => {\n273\t                            // Write failed, clear pin\n274\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n275\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n276\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n277\t                            (None, Some(\"block_failed\"))\n278\t                        }\n279\t                        Err(_) => {\n280\t                            // Timeout - still route to pinned group (best effort)\n281\t                            let wait_duration = wait_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n282\t                            state.metrics.observe_session_wait_duration(wait_duration);\n283\t                            state.metrics.inc_session_wait_timeout(\"block\");\n284\t                            (Some(group), Some(\"block_timeout\"))\n285\t                        }\n286\t                    }\n287\t                }\n288\t                WaitStrategy::RoutePin => {\n289\t                    // Route to pinned group without waiting\n290\t                    state.metrics.inc_session_pin_enforced(\"route_pin\");\n291\t                    (Some(group), Some(\"route_pin\"))\n292\t                }\n293\t            }\n294\t        } else {\n295\t            // No pending write - normal routing\n296\t            (None, None)\n297\t        }\n298\t    } else {\n299\t        // No session header - normal routing\n300\t        (None, None)\n301\t    };\n302\t\n303\t    // Log session pinning decision for observability\n304\t    if let Some(label) = strategy_label {\n305\t        debug!(\n306\t            session_id = ?sid,\n307\t            pinned_group = pinned_group,\n308\t            strategy = label,\n309\t            \"session pinning applied\"\n310\t        );\n311\t    }\n312\t\n313\t    // Query coalescing (plan §13.10): Check for identical in-flight queries\n314\t    // Skip for multi-target aliases (each target is different)\n315\t    if state.config.query_coalescing.enabled && resolved_targets.len() == 1 {\n316\t        // Build fingerprint from canonicalized query body + index + settings version\n317\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n318\t        let query_json = serde_json::to_string(&body).unwrap_or_default();\n319\t        let fingerprint = QueryFingerprint {\n320\t            index: effective_index.clone(),\n321\t            query_json,\n322\t            settings_version,\n323\t        };\n324\t\n325\t        // Try to coalesce with an existing in-flight query\n326\t        if let Some(mut rx) = state.query_coalescer.try_coalesce(fingerprint.clone()).await {\n327\t            // Successfully subscribed to an in-flight query - wait for its result\n328\t            state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_hits();\n329\t            debug!(\n330\t                index = %effective_index,\n331\t                \"query coalesced: waiting for in-flight query result\"\n332\t            );\n333\t\n334\t            // Wait for the response (with timeout matching the scatter timeout)\n335\t            let timeout = Duration::from_millis(state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms);\n336\t            let response_bytes = tokio::time::timeout(timeout, async move {\n337\t                rx.recv().await\n338\t            }).await;\n339\t\n340\t            match response_bytes {\n341\t                Ok(Ok(response_bytes)) => {\n342\t                    // Received response from coalesced query\n343\t                    let response_body: Value = match serde_json::from_slice(&response_bytes) {\n344\t                        Ok(v) => v,\n345\t                        Err(e) => {\n346\t                            error!(error = %e, \"failed to deserialize coalesced query response\");\n347\t                            return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR);\n348\t                        }\n349\t                    };\n350\t\n351\t                    // Build response with appropriate headers\n352\t                    let mut response = Response::builder()\n353\t                        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n354\t                        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n355\t\n356\t                    // Add settings headers\n357\t                    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(&effective_index).await {\n358\t                        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n359\t                    }\n360\t                    if settings_version > 0 {\n361\t                        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", settings_version.to_string());\n362\t                    }\n363\t\n364\t                    let response = response\n365\t                        .body(axum::body::Body::from(serde_json::to_string(&response_body).unwrap()))\n366\t                        .unwrap();\n367\t\n368\t                    tracing::info!(\n369\t                        target: \"miroir.search_coalesced\",\n370\t                        index = %effective_index,\n371\t                        duration_ms = start.elapsed().as_millis() as u64,\n372\t                        \"coalesced search completed\"\n373\t                    );\n374\t\n375\t                    return Ok(response);\n376\t                }\n377\t                Ok(Err(_)) => {\n378\t                    // Channel closed without receiving response - proceed with normal scatter\n379\t                    debug!(\"coalesced query channel closed, proceeding with normal scatter\");\n380\t                }\n381\t                Err(_) => {\n382\t                    // Timeout waiting for coalesced query - proceed with normal scatter\n383\t                    debug!(\"timeout waiting for coalesced query, proceeding with normal scatter\");\n384\t                }\n385\t            }\n386\t        }\n387\t    }\n388\t\n389\t    // Handle multi-target alias fanout (plan §13.7, §13.11, §13.17)\n390\t    // Multi-target aliases (ILM read_alias) require fanning out to all targets\n391\t    // and merging results by _rankingScore\n392\t    if resolved_targets.len() > 1 {\n393\t        return search_multi_targets(\n394\t            resolved_targets,\n395\t            body,\n396\t            state,\n397\t            headers,\n398\t            sid,\n399\t            client_requested_score,\n400\t        ).await;\n401\t    }\n402\t\n403\t    // Get the scoped key for this index (plan §13.21).\n404\t    // If a scoped key exists, use primary_key (or previous_key during rotation overlap).\n405\t    // If no scoped key exists yet, fall back to node_master_key for initial setup.\n406\t    let search_key = if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n407\t        if let Ok(Some(sk)) = redis.get_search_ui_scoped_key(&effective_index) {\n408\t            // Refresh scoped-key beacon so the rotation leader knows this pod is serving\n409\t            // requests for this index at the current generation (plan §13.21).\n410\t            let _ = redis.observe_search_ui_scoped_key(\n411\t                &state.pod_id,\n412\t                &index,\n413\t                sk.generation,\n414\t            );\n415\t\n416\t            // Use primary_key; previous_key is the overlap fallback (both are valid in Meilisearch)\n417\t            sk.primary_key\n418\t        } else {\n419\t            // No scoped key yet — fall back to node_master_key for initial setup\n420\t            state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n421\t        }\n422\t    } else {\n423\t        // No Redis store — fall back to node_master_key (single-pod dev mode)\n424\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone()\n425\t    };\n426\t\n427\t    // Extract X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version header (plan §13.5)\n428\t    let min_settings_version = headers\n429\t        .get(\"X-Miroir-Min-Settings-Version\")\n430\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n431\t        .and_then(|s| s.parse::<u64>().ok());\n432\t\n433\t    // Use live topology from shared state (updated by health checker)\n434\t    let topo = state.topology.read().await;\n435\t    let policy = match state.config.scatter.unavailable_shard_policy.as_str() {\n436\t        \"partial\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial,\n437\t        \"error\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Error,\n438\t        \"fallback\" => UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback,\n439\t        _ => return Err(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR),\n440\t    };\n441\t\n442\t    // Plan scatter using live topology (span for plan construction)\n443\t    let plan = {\n444\t        let _plan_span = tracing::info_span!(\n445\t            \"scatter_plan\",\n446\t            replica_groups = state.config.replica_groups,\n447\t            shards = state.config.shards,\n448\t            rf = state.config.replication_factor,\n449\t            min_settings_version,\n450\t            pinned_group = ?pinned_group,\n451\t            strategy = %state.config.replica_selection.strategy,\n452\t        ).entered();\n453\t\n454\t        // Determine if we should use adaptive selection\n455\t        let use_adaptive = state.config.replica_selection.strategy == \"adaptive\";\n456\t        let replica_selector_ref = if use_adaptive {\n457\t            Some(state.replica_selector.as_ref())\n458\t        } else {\n459\t            None\n460\t        };\n461\t\n462\t        // Session pinning: if pinned_group is set, use group-specific planning\n463\t        if let Some(group) = pinned_group {\n464\t            match plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n465\t                &topo,\n466\t                0,\n467\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n468\t                state.config.shards,\n469\t                group,\n470\t                replica_selector_ref,\n471\t            ).await {\n472\t                Some(p) => p,\n473\t                None => {\n474\t                    // Pinned group not available - fall back to normal planning\n475\t                    // This can happen if the pinned group has failed\n476\t                    warn!(\n477\t                        pinned_group = group,\n478\t                        \"pinned group unavailable, falling back to normal routing\"\n479\t                    );\n480\t                    plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n481\t                }\n482\t            }\n483\t        } else if let Some(floor) = min_settings_version {\n484\t            // If client provided a min settings version floor, use version-filtered planning\n485\t            // Clone the settings broadcast for version checking\n486\t            let settings_broadcast = state.settings_broadcast.clone();\n487\t            let plan_result = plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n488\t                &topo,\n489\t                0,\n490\t                state.config.replication_factor as usize,\n491\t                state.config.shards,\n492\t                &index,\n493\t                floor,\n494\t                &move |idx, node_id| {\n495\t                    // Use a blocking task wrapper since we're in a sync context\n496\t                    let sb = settings_broadcast.clone();\n497\t                    let idx = idx.to_string();\n498\t                    let node_id = node_id.to_string();\n499\t                    tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n500\t                        tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n501\t                            sb.node_version(&idx, &node_id).await\n502\t                        })\n503\t                    })\n504\t                },\n505\t                replica_selector_ref,\n506\t            ).await;\n507\t\n508\t            match plan_result {\n509\t                Some(p) => p,\n510\t                None => {\n511\t                    // No covering set could be assembled after filtering by version floor\n512\t                    let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n513\t                        MiroirCode::SettingsVersionStale,\n514\t                        format!(\n515\t                            \"no covering set available for settings version floor {} on index '{}'\",\n516\t                            floor, index\n517\t                        ),\n518\t                    );\n519\t                    return Err(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE);\n520\t                }\n521\t            }\n522\t        } else {\n523\t            // No version floor requested, use normal planning\n524\t            plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, state.config.replication_factor as usize, state.config.shards, replica_selector_ref).await\n525\t        }\n526\t    };\n527\t    let node_count = plan.shard_to_node.len() as u64;\n528\t\n529\t    // Record scatter fan-out size before executing\n530\t    state.metrics.record_scatter_fan_out(node_count);\n531\t\n532\t    // Build search request\n533\t    let search_req = SearchRequest {\n534\t        index_uid: effective_index.clone(),\n535\t        query: body.q,\n536\t        offset: body.offset.unwrap_or(0),\n537\t        limit: body.limit.unwrap_or(20),\n538\t        filter: body.filter,\n539\t        facets: body.facets,\n540\t        ranking_score: client_requested_score,\n541\t        body: body.rest,\n542\t        global_idf: None,\n543\t    };\n544\t\n545\t    // Create node client with the scoped key (or node_master_key as fallback)\n546\t    let http_client = Arc::new(crate::client::HttpClient::new(\n547\t        search_key,\n548\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n549\t    ));\n550\t    let client = ProxyNodeClient::new(http_client, state.metrics.clone(), None);\n551\t\n552\t    // Use score-based merge strategy (OP#4: requires global IDF)\n553\t    let strategy = ScoreMergeStrategy::new();\n554\t\n555\t    // Register for query coalescing (plan §13.10) - after try_coalesce, before scatter\n556\t    // Only register if coalescing is enabled and this is a single-target query\n557\t    let (tx, fingerprint) = if state.config.query_coalescing.enabled && resolved_targets.len() == 1 {\n558\t        let settings_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n559\t        let query_json = serde_json::to_string(&body).unwrap_or_default();\n560\t        let fp = QueryFingerprint {\n561\t            index: effective_index.clone(),\n562\t            query_json,\n563\t            settings_version,\n564\t        };\n565\t\n566\t        match state.query_coalescer.register(fp.clone()).await {\n567\t            Ok(broadcast_tx) => {\n568\t                state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(1); // First subscriber = the query itself\n569\t                (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp))\n570\t            }\n571\t            Err(_) => {\n572\t                // Failed to register (too many pending queries) - proceed without coalescing\n573\t                debug!(\"too many pending queries, proceeding without coalescing registration\");\n574\t                (None, None)\n575\t            }\n576\t        }\n577\t    } else {\n578\t        (None, None)\n579\t    };\n580\t\n581\t    // Execute DFS query-then-fetch\n582\t    let mut result = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(\n583\t        plan,\n584\t        &client,\n585\t        search_req,\n586\t        &topo,\n587\t        policy,\n588\t        &strategy,\n589\t    )\n590\t    .await\n591\t    .map_err(|e| {\n592\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"search failed\");\n593\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n594\t    })?;\n595\t\n596\t    // Drop topology lock before building response\n597\t    drop(topo);\n598\t\n599\t    // Strip internal fields from hits\n600\t    for hit in &mut result.hits {\n601\t        strip_internal_fields(hit, client_requested_score);\n602\t    }\n603\t\n604\t    // Build response body\n605\t    let response_body = serde_json::json!({\n606\t        \"hits\": result.hits,\n607\t        \"estimatedTotalHits\": result.estimated_total_hits,\n608\t        \"processingTimeMs\": result.processing_time_ms,\n609\t    });\n610\t\n611\t    // Only include facetDistribution if facets were requested\n612\t    let mut body = response_body.clone();\n613\t    if let Some(facets) = &result.facet_distribution {\n614\t        body[\"facetDistribution\"] = serde_json::to_value(facets).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n615\t    }\n616\t\n617\t    // Broadcast result to coalesced queries (plan §13.10)\n618\t    if let (Some(broadcast_tx), Some(fp)) = (tx, fingerprint) {\n619\t        let response_bytes = serde_json::to_vec(&body).unwrap_or_default();\n620\t        let subscriber_count = broadcast_tx.receiver_count();\n621\t        if subscriber_count > 1 {\n622\t            // There are other queries waiting for this result - broadcast to them\n623\t            state.metrics.inc_query_coalesce_subscribers(subscriber_count as u64 - 1);\n624\t            let _ = broadcast_tx.send(response_bytes.clone());\n625\t            debug!(\n626\t                index = %effective_index,\n627\t                subscribers = subscriber_count - 1,\n628\t                \"broadcast search result to coalesced queries\"\n629\t            );\n630\t        }\n631\t        // Unregister the query after broadcasting\n632\t        state.query_coalescer.unregister(&fp).await;\n633\t    }\n634\t\n635\t    // Build response with optional headers\n636\t    let mut response = Response::builder()\n637\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n638\t        .header(\"content-type\", \"application/json\");\n639\t\n640\t    // Add X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent header if a broadcast is in flight (plan §13.5)\n641\t    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(&effective_index).await {\n642\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Inconsistent\", \"true\");\n643\t    }\n644\t\n645\t    // Add X-Miroir-Settings-Version header if we have a version for this index\n646\t    let current_version = state.settings_broadcast.current_version().await;\n647\t    if current_version > 0 {\n648\t        response = response.header(\"X-Miroir-Settings-Version\", current_version.to_string());\n649\t    }\n650\t\n651\t    if result.degraded {\n652\t {\n100\t        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n101\t    }\n102\t\n103\t    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n104\t    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n105\t        // Track that this group had a failure\n106\t        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n107\t    }\n108\t\n109\t    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n110\t    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n111\t        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n112\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n113\t        let met = acks >= quorum;\n114\t        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n115\t        met\n116\t    }\n117\t\n118\t    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n119\t    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n120\t        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n121\t    }\n122\t\n123\t    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n124\t    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n125\t        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n126\t        for group_id in 0..replica_group_count {\n127\t            if !self.check_group_quorum(group_id, rf) {\n128\t                // Only count as degraded if we attempted to write to this group\n129\t                if self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n130\t                    degraded += 1;\n131\t                }\n132\t            }\n133\t        }\n134\t        degraded\n135\t    }\n136\t}\n137\t\n138\t/// Build router for document endpoints.\n139\tpub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\n140\twhere\n141\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n142\t{\n143\t    Router::new()\n144\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n145\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::put(put_documents))\n146\t        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n147\t        .route(\"/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document_by_id))\n148\t}\n149\t\n150\t/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents - Add documents.\n151\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n152\tasync fn post_documents(\n153\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n154\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n155\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n156\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n157\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n158\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n159\t    // Extract session ID from request extensions (set by session_pinning_middleware)\n160\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n161\t        let s = ext.0;\n162\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n163\t    });\n164\t\n165\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid).await\n166\t}\n167\t\n168\t/// PUT /indexes/{uid}/documents - Replace documents.\n169\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\n170\tasync fn put_documents(\n171\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n172\t    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n173\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n174\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n175\t    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n176\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n177\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n178\t        let s = ext.0;\n179\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n180\t    });\n181\t    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid).await\n182\t}\n183\t\n184\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents - Delete by IDs or filter.\n185\tasync fn delete_documents(\n186\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n187\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n188\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n189\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n190\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n191\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n192\t        let s = ext.0;\n193\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n194\t    });\n195\t\n196\t    // Try to parse as delete by filter first\n197\t    if let Some(filter) = body.get(\"filter\") {\n198\t        let req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n199\t            index_uid: index.clone(),\n200\t            filter: filter.clone(),\n201\t            origin: None, // Client write\n202\t        };\n203\t        return delete_by_filter_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await;\n204\t    }\n205\t\n206\t    // Try to parse as delete by IDs\n207\t    if let Some(ids) = body.get(\"ids\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n208\t        let ids: Vec<String> = ids\n209\t            .iter()\n210\t            .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(|s| s.to_string()))\n211\t            .collect();\n212\t        if !ids.is_empty() {\n213\t            let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n214\t                index_uid: index.clone(),\n215\t                ids,\n216\t                origin: None, // Client write\n217\t            };\n218\t            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await;\n219\t        }\n220\t    }\n221\t\n222\t    // If we get here, the request body is malformed\n223\t    Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n224\t        MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n225\t        \"delete request must include either 'filter' or 'ids' field\",\n226\t    ))\n227\t}\n228\t\n229\t/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id} - Delete single document by ID.\n230\tasync fn delete_document_by_id(\n231\t    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n232\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n233\t    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n234\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n235\t    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n236\t        let s = ext.0;\n237\t        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n238\t    });\n239\t    let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n240\t        index_uid: index.clone(),\n241\t        ids: vec![id],\n242\t        origin: None, // Client write\n243\t    };\n244\t    delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await\n245\t}\n246\t\n247\t/// Implementation for write documents (POST/PUT).\n248\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index, session_id))]\n249\tasync fn write_documents_impl(\n250\t    index: String,\n251\t    primary_key: Option<String>,\n252\t    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n253\t    state: &AppState,\n254\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n255\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n256\t    if documents.is_empty() {\n257\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n258\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n259\t            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n260\t        ));\n261\t    }\n262\t\n263\t    // 1. Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n264\t    // Aliases are resolved before any processing; writes to multi-target aliases are rejected\n265\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n266\t        // Check if the index is an alias\n267\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n268\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n269\t            // It was an alias\n270\t            // Check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only, ILM-managed)\n271\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n272\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n273\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n274\t                    format!(\n275\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); writes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n276\t                        index\n277\t                    ),\n278\t                ));\n279\t            }\n280\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n281\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n282\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n283\t        } else {\n284\t            // Not an alias, use the index name as-is\n285\t            index.clone()\n286\t        }\n287\t    } else {\n288\t        index.clone()\n289\t    };\n290\t\n291\t    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n292\t    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n293\t        documents\n294\t            .first()\n295\t            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n296\t    });\n297\t\n298\t    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n299\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n300\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n301\t            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n302\t        )\n303\t    })?;\n304\t\n305\t    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n306\t    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n307\t    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n308\t    let ttl_enabled = state.config.ttl.enabled;\n309\t    let expires_at_field = &state.config.ttl.expires_at_field;\n310\t\n311\t    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n312\t        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n313\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n314\t        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n315\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n316\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n317\t                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n318\t            ));\n319\t        }\n320\t\n321\t        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n322\t        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n323\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n324\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n325\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n326\t            ));\n327\t        }\n328\t\n329\t        // _miroir_expires_at is reserved ONLY when ttl.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.14)\n330\t        // When reserved, clients cannot SET it; the orchestrator controls it. When disabled,\n331\t        // client values pass through end-to-end.\n332\t        if ttl_enabled && doc.get(expires_at_field).is_some() {\n333\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n334\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n335\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", expires_at_field),\n336\t            ));\n337\t        }\n338\t\n339\t        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n340\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n341\t                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n342\t                format!(\n343\t                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n344\t                    i, primary_key\n345\t                ),\n346\t            ));\n347\t        }\n348\t    }\n349\t\n350\t    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard and _miroir_updated_at into each document\n351\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n352\t    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n353\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n354\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n355\t\n356\t    // Get current timestamp in milliseconds since epoch for _miroir_updated_at stamping\n357\t    let now_ms = if anti_entropy_enabled {\n358\t        Some(\n359\t            std::time::SystemTime::now()\n360\t                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n361\t                .unwrap_or_default()\n362\t                .as_millis() as u64\n363\t        )\n364\t    } else {\n365\t        None\n366\t    };\n367\t\n368\t    for doc in &mut documents {\n369\t        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n370\t            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n371\t            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        // Stamp _miroir_updated_at when anti_entropy is enabled (plan §13.8)\n375\t        // This happens AFTER reserved field validation, so orchestrator-controlled injection is allowed\n376\t        if let Some(timestamp) = now_ms {\n377\t            doc[updated_at_field] = serde_json::json!(timestamp);\n378\t        }\n379\t    }\n380\t\n381\t    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n382\t    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n383\t\n384\t    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n385\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n386\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n387\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n388\t    );\n389\t\n390\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n391\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n392\t\n393\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n394\t    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n395\t        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n396\t        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n397\t            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n398\t            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n399\t                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n400\t                    c.read().await\n401\t                })\n402\t            })\n403\t        });\n404\t\n405\t        // Use migration-aware routing\n406\t        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n407\t            shard_id,\n408\t            &topology,\n409\t            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n410\t        );\n411\t\n412\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n413\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n414\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n415\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n416\t            ));\n417\t        }\n418\t\n419\t        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n420\t\n421\t        for node_id in targets {\n422\t            let node = topology\n423\t                .node(&node_id)\n424\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n425\t\n426\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n427\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n428\t\n429\t            let req = WriteRequest {\n430\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n431\t                documents: docs.clone(),\n432\t                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n433\t                origin: None, // Client write\n434\t            };\n435\t\n436\t            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n437\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n438\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n439\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n440\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n441\t                    }\n442\t                }\n443\t                Ok(resp) => {\n444\t                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n445\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n446\t                }\n447\t                Err(_) => {\n448\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n449\t                }\n450\t            }\n451\t        }\n452\t    }\n453\t\n454\t    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n455\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n456\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n457\t\n458\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n459\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n460\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n461\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n462\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n463\t        ));\n464\t    }\n465\t\n466\t    // 6.5. Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n467\t    // Groups are checked in ascending order, so the first one with quorum is the first\n468\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n469\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n470\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n471\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n472\t            acks >= quorum\n473\t        })\n474\t        .unwrap_or(0); // Default to group 0 if somehow no quorum (shouldn't happen here)\n475\t\n476\t    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n477\t    let miroir_task = state\n478\t        .task_registry\n479\t        .register_with_metadata(\n480\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n481\t            Some(index_uid.clone()),\n482\t            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n483\t        )\n484\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n485\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n486\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n487\t        ))?;\n488\t\n489\t    // 7.5. Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n490\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n491\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n492\t            sid,\n493\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n494\t            first_quorum_group,\n495\t        ).await {\n496\t            // Log error but don't fail the write - session pinning is best-effort\n497\t            tracing::error!(\n498\t                session_id = %sid,\n499\t                error = %e,\n500\t                \"failed to record session pinning for write\"\n501\t            );\n502\t        }\n503\t    }\n504\t\n505\t    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n506\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n507\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n508\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n509\t            indexUid: Some(index_uid.clone()),\n510\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n511\t            error: None,\n512\t            error_type: None,\n513\t            code: None,\n514\t            link: None,\n515\t        },\n516\t        degraded_groups,\n517\t    )\n518\t}\n519\t\n520\t/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\n521\tasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n522\t    index: String,\n523\t    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n524\t    state: &AppState,\n525\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n526\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n527\t    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n528\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n529\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n530\t            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n531\t        ));\n532\t    }\n533\t\n534\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n535\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n536\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n537\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n538\t            // It was an alias - check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only)\n539\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n540\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n541\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n542\t                    format!(\n543\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); deletes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n544\t                        index\n545\t                    ),\n546\t                ));\n547\t            }\n548\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n549\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n550\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n551\t        } else {\n552\t            index.clone()\n553\t        }\n554\t    } else {\n555\t        index.clone()\n556\t    };\n557\t\n558\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n559\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n560\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n561\t\n562\t    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n563\t    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n564\t    for id in &req.ids {\n565\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n566\t        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n567\t    }\n568\t\n569\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n570\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n571\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n572\t    );\n573\t\n574\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n575\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n576\t\n577\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n578\t    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n579\t        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n580\t\n581\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n582\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n583\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n584\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n585\t            ));\n586\t        }\n587\t\n588\t        for node_id in targets {\n589\t            let node = topology\n590\t                .node(&node_id)\n591\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n592\t\n593\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n594\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n595\t\n596\t            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n597\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n598\t                ids: ids.clone(),\n599\t                origin: None, // Client write\n600\t            };\n601\t\n602\t            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n603\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n604\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n605\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n606\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n607\t                    }\n608\t                }\n609\t                Ok(resp) => {\n610\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n611\t                }\n612\t                Err(_) => {\n613\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n614\t                }\n615\t            }\n616\t        }\n617\t    }\n618\t\n619\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n620\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n621\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n622\t\n623\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n624\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n625\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n626\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n627\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n628\t        ));\n629\t    }\n630\t\n631\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n632\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n633\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n634\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n635\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n636\t            acks >= quorum\n637\t        })\n638\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n639\t\n640\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n641\t    let miroir_task = state\n642\t        .task_registry\n643\t        .register_with_metadata(\n644\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n645\t            Some(index.clone()),\n646\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n647\t        )\n648\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n649\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n650\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n651\t        ))?;\n652\t\n653\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n654\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n655\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n656\t            sid,\n657\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n658\t            first_quorum_group,\n659\t        ).await {\n660\t            tracing::error!(\n661\t                session_id = %sid,\n662\t                error = %e,\n663\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete\"\n664\t            );\n665\t        }\n666\t    }\n667\t\n668\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n669\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n670\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n671\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n672\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n673\t            error: None,\n674\t            error_type: None,\n675\t            code: None,\n676\t            link: None,\n677\t        },\n678\t        degraded_groups,\n679\t    )\n680\t}\n681\t\n682\t/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\n683\tasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n684\t    index: String,\n685\t    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n686\t    state: &AppState,\n687\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n688\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n689\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n690\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n691\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n692\t\n693\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n694\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n695\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n696\t    );\n697\t\n698\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n699\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n700\t\n701\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n702\t    for node in topology.nodes() {\n703\t        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n704\t        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n705\t\n706\t        match client\n707\t            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n708\t            .await\n709\t        {\n710\t            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n711\t                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n712\t                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n713\t                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n714\t                }\n715\t            }\n716\t            Ok(resp) => {\n717\t                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n718\t            }\n719\t            Err(_) => {\n720\t                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n721\t            }\n722\t        }\n723\t    }\n724\t\n725\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n726\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n727\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n728\t\n729\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n730\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n731\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n732\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n733\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n734\t        ));\n735\t    }\n736\t\n737\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n738\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n739\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n740\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n741\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n742\t            acks >= quorum\n743\t        })\n744\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n745\t\n746\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n747\t    let miroir_task = state\n748\t        .task_registry\n749\t        .register_with_metadata(\n750\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n751\t            Some(index.clone()),\n752\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n753\t        )\n754\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n755\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n756\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n757\t        ))?;\n758\t\n759\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n760\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n761\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n762\t            sid,\n763\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n764\t            first_quorum_group,\n765\t        ).await {\n766\t            tracing::error!(\n767\t                session_id = %sid,\n768\t                error = %e,\n769\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete by filter\"\n770\t            );\n771\t        }\n772\t    }\n773\t\n774\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n775\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n776\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n777\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n778\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n779\t            error: None,\n780\t            error_type: None,\n781\t            code: None,\n782\t            link: None,\n783\t        },\n784\t        degraded_groups,\n785\t    )\n786\t}\n787\t\n788\t/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n789\t///\n790\t/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\n791\tfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n792\t    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n793\t        .iter()\n794\t        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n795\t        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n796\t}\n797\t\n798\t/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n799\t///\n800\t/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n801\t/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n802\t///\n803\t/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\n804\tfn group_documents_by_shard(\n805\t    documents: &[Value],\n806\t    primary_key: &str,\n807\t    topology: &Topology,\n808\t) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n809\t    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n810\t\n811\t    for doc in documents {\n812\t        let pk_value = doc\n813\t            .get(primary_key)\n814\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n815\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n816\t                MeilisearchError::new(\n817\t                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n818\t                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n819\t                )\n820\t            })?;\n821\t\n822\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n823\t        shard_documents\n824\t            .entry(shard_id)\n825\t            .or_default()\n826\t            .push(doc.clone());\n827\t    }\n828\t\n829\t    Ok(shard_documents)\n830\t}\n831\t\n832\t/// Build an error response from a node error.\n833\tfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n834\t    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n835\t        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n836\t        indexUid: None,\n837\t        status: None,\n838\t        error: resp.message,\n839\t        error_type: resp.error_type,\n840\t        code: resp.code,\n841\t        link: None,\n842\t    }\n843\t}\n844\t\n845\t/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\n846\tfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n847\t    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n848\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n849\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n850\t    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n851\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n852\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n853\t            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n854\t        )\n855\t    })?;\n856\t\n857\t    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n858\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n859\t        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n860\t\n861\t    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n862\t    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n863\t        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n864\t    }\n865\t\n866\t    Ok(builder\n867\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n868\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n869\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n870\t            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n871\t        ))?)\n872\t}\n873\t\n874\t/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\n875\tfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n876\t    (\n877\t        StatusCode::OK,\n878\t        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n879\t        Json(resp),\n880\t    )\n881\t        .into_response()\n882\t}\n883\t\n884\t#[cfg(test)]\n885\tmod tests {\n886\t    use super::*;\n887\t    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n888\t    use serde_json::json;\n889\t\n890\t    #[test]\n891\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_common_fields() {\n892\t        let doc_with_id = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test123\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n893\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_id), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n894\t\n895\t        let doc_with_pk = serde_json::json!({\"pk\": \"test456\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n896\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_pk), Some(\"pk\".to_string()));\n897\t\n898\t        let doc_with_key = serde_json::json!({\"key\": \"test789\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n899\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_key), Some(\"key\".to_string()));\n900\t\n901\t        let doc_with__id = serde_json::json!({\"_id\": \"test000\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n902\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with__id), Some(\"_id\".to_string()));\n903\t    }\n904\t\n905\t    #[test]\n906\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_no_common_field() \"another\"});\n915\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n916\t    }\n917\t\n918\t    // Reserved field validation tests (P2.9)\n919\t    //\n920\t    // Tests the {\n927\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n928\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n929\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}`\", field),\n930\t        )\n931\t    }\n932\t\n933\t    #[test]\n934\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_shard_always_rejected() {\n935\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved regardless of config\n936\t        let err = assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_custom\").is_some());\n971\t        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_metadata\").is_some());\n972\t    }\n973\t\n974\t    /// Test matrix of all reserved field combinations per plan |-----------------|-----------------|----------------|\n979\t    /// | _miroir_shard   | REJECTED (always)  | REJECTED (always) |\n980\t    /// | _miroir_updated_at | ALLOWED      | REJECTED (anti_entropy) |\n981\t    /// | _miroir_expires_at | ALLOWED      | REJECTED (ttl) |\n982\t    #[test]\n983\t    fn test_reserved_field_matrix() {\n984\t        struct TestCase {\n985\t }\n991\t\n992\t        let test_cases = vec![\n993\t            TestCase {\n994\t                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\"}),\n995\t                description: \"clean document should pass\",\n996\t                has_shard: false,\n997\t                has_updated_at: false,\n998\t                has_expires_at: false,\n999\t            },\n1000\t            TestCase {\n1001\t                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_shard\": 1}),\n1002\t                description: \"_miroir_shard always rejected\",\n1003\t                has_shard: true,\n1004\t                has_updated_at: false,\n1005\t                has_expires_at: false,\n1006\t            },\n1007\t            TestCase {\n1008\t                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_updated_at\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\"}),\n1009\t                description: \"_miroir_updated_at allowed when anti_entropy disabled\",\n1010\t                has_shard: false,\n1011\t                has_updated_at: true,\n1012\t                has_expires_at: false,\n1013\t            },\n1014\t            TestCase {\n1015\t                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_expires_at\": \"2024-12-31T23:59:59Z\"}),\n1016\t                description: \"_miroir_expires_at allowed when ttl.disabled\",\n1017\t                has_shard: false,\n1018\t                has_updated_at:             description: \"non-reserved _miroir_ fields allowed\",\n1024\t                has_shard: false,\n1025\t                has_updated_at: false,\n1026\t                has_expires_at: false,\n1027\t            },\n1028\t            TestCase {\n1029\t                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_shard\": 1, \"_miroir_updated_at\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\"}),\n1030\t                description: \"multiple reserved fields present\",\n1031\t                has_shard: true,\n1032\t                has_updated_at: true,\n1033\t                has_expires_at: false,\n1034\t            },\n1035\t        ];\n1036\t\n1037\t        for tc in test_cases {\n1038\t            assert_eq!(tc.doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some(), tc.has_shard, \"{}: shard check\", tc.description);\n1039\t            assert_eq!(tc.doc.get(\"_miroir_updated_at\").is_some(), tc.has_updated_at, \"{}: updated_at check\", tc.description);\n1040\t            assert_eq!(tc.doc.get(\"_miroir_expires_at\").is_some(), tc.has_expires_at, \"{}: expires_at check\", tc.description);\n1041\t        }\n1042\t    }\n1043\t\n1044\t    #[test]\n1045\t    fn test_reserved_field_error_format_matches_meilisearch_shape() {\n1046\t        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n1047\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n1048\t            \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n1049\t        );\n1050\t\n1051\t        // Verify Meilisearch-compatible error shape: {message, code, type, link}\n1052\t        let json = serde_json::to_value(&err).unwrap();\n1053\t        assert_eq!(json[\"code\"], \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n1054\t        assert_eq!(json[\"type\"], \"invalid_request\");\n1055\t        assert!(json[\"message\"].is_string());\n1056\t        assert!(json[\"link\"].as_str().unwrap().contains(\"miroir_reserved_field\"));\n1057\t        assert_eq!(json[\"message\"], \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\");\n1058\t    }\n1059\t\n1060\t    #[test]\n1061\t    fn test_reserved_field_error_all_fields_present() {\n1062\t        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n1063\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n1064\t            \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_updated_at`\",\n1065\t        );\n1066\t\n1067\t        // Verify all required fields are present\n1068\t        assert!(!err.message.is_empty());\n1069\t        assert!(!err.code.is_empty());\n1070\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n1071\t        assert!(err.link.is_some());\n1072\t        assert!(err.link.unwrap().contains(\"miroir_reserved_field\"));\n1073\t    }\n1074\t\n1075\t    #[test]\n1076\t    fn test_orchestrator_shard_injection_flow() {\n1077\t        // Simulate the orchestrator injection flow:\n1078\t        // 1. Client sends document WITHOUT _miroir_shard\n1079\t        // 2. Validation passes (no _miroir_shard present)\n1080\t        // 3. Orchestrator injects _miroir_shard for routing\n1081\t        // 4. Write proceeds with injected field\n1082\t\n1083\t        let client_doc = json!({\"id\": \"user:123\", \"name\": \"Test User\"});\n1084\t        assert!(client_doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_none(), \"client doc should not have _miroir_shard\");\n1085\t\n1086\t        // Simulate orchestrator injection (happens AFTER validation at line 279-290)\n1087\t        let mut doc_with_shard = client_doc.clone();\n1088\t        doc_with_shard[\"_miroir_shard\"] = json!(5);\n1089\t\n1090\t        assert_eq!(doc_with_shard[\"_miroir_shard\"], 5, \"orchestrator should inject _miroir_shard\");\n1091\t        assert!(doc_with_shard.get(\"id\").is_some(), \"primary key should still be present\");\n1092\t    }\n1093\t\n1094\t    #[test]\n1095\t    fn test_reserved_field_validation_order() {\n1096\t        // _miroir_shard is checked BEFORE primary key validation (per acceptance criteria)\n1097\t        // This ensures clients can't bypass validation by including both fields\n1098\t\n1099\t        let doc_with_shard_no_pk = json!({\"_miroir_shard\": 1, \"name\": \"No PK\"});\n1100\t        assert!(doc_with_shard_no_pk.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some());\n1101\t        assert!(doc_with_shard_no_pk.get(\"id\").is_none());\n1102\t\n1103\t        // The validation should catch _miroir_shard first, not missing primary key\n1104\t        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n1105\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n1106\t    }\n1107\t\n1108\t    // |-----------------|-----------------|----------------|\n1113\t    // | _miroir_shard   | REJECTED        | REJECTED       |\n1114\t    // | _miroir_updated_at | ALLOWED    | REJECTED (AE)  |\n1115\t    // | _miroir_expires_at | ALLOWED    | REJECTED (TTL) |\n1116\t\n1117\t    #[test]\n1118\t    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_shard_always_rejected() {\n1119\t        // _miroir_shard: Always reserved 400);\n1123\t    }\n1124\t\n1125\t    #[test]\n1126\t    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_updated_at_rejected_when_ae_enabled() {\n1127\t        // _miroir_updated_at: Rejected when anti_entropy.enabled: #[test]\n1137\t    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_expires_at_rejected_when_ttl_enabled() {\n1138\t        // _miroir_expires_at: Rejected when ttl.enabled: true\n1139\t        let err = {\n53\t    pub df: u64,\n54\t    pub idf: f64,\n55\t}\n56\t\n57\t/// Aggregated global IDF data computed at the coordinator.\n58\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n59\tpub struct preflight responses into global IDF.\n67\t    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n68\t        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n69\t        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n70\t        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n71\t\n72\t        for resp in responses {\n73\t            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n74\t            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n75\t            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n76\t                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n77\t            }\n78\t        }\n79\t\n80\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n81\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n82\t        } else {\n83\t            0.0\n84\t        };\n85\t\n86\t        let n = total_docs as f64;\n87\t        let terms = term_df\n88\t            .into_iter()\n89\t            .map(|(term, df)| {\n90\t                let idf = if df == 0 {\n91\t                    0.0\n92\t                } else {\n93\t                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n94\t                };\n95\t                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n96\t            })\n97\t            .collect();\n98\t\n99\t        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n100\t    }\n101\t}\n102\t\n103\t// unless emit_internal_writes)\n122\t    /// - Some(\"ttl_expire\") = TTL expiration delete (suppressed unless emit_ttl_deletes)\n123\t    ///\n124\t    /// This field is NEVER stored on documents and success: false,\n247\t            task_uid: None,\n248\t            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n249\t            code: None,\n250\t            error_type: None,\n251\t        })\n252\t    }\n253\t\n254\t    /// Get task status from a node.\n255\t    fn get_task_status(\n256\t        &self,\n257\t        _node: &NodeId,\n258\t        _address: &str,\n259\t        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n260\t    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n261\t        async move {\n262\t            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n263\t                task_uid: _request.task_uid,\n264\t                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n265\t                error: None,\n266\t                error_type: None,\n267\t            })\n268\t        }\n269\t    }\n270\t\n271\t    /// Delete documents by IDs from a node.\n272\t    async fn delete_documents(\n273\t        &self,\n274\t        _node: &NodeId,\n275\t        _address: &str,\n276\t        _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n277\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n278\t        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n279\t            success: false,\n280\t            task_uid: None,\n281\t            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n282\t            code: None,\n283\t            error_type: None,\n284\t        })\n285\t    }\n286\t\n287\t    /// Delete all documents matching a filter from a node.\n288\t    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n289\t        &self,\n290\t        _node: &NodeId,\n291\t        _address: &str,\n292\t        _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n293\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n294\t        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n295\t            success: false,\n296\t            task_uid:
